notes: IDEAL expectations for CAQNW9Q2 (Buckland-Wright 1994 review article).
No abstract. Review article in Annals of the Rheumatic Diseases 1994; 53: 268-275.
Page 1: header/journal line, REVIEW label, title, author, body text, section heading.
Figures 1-3 are radiographic X-ray images - must be reader-visible.

assertions.notes: Real: noise - acceptable, just needs must_not_render
Real: unknown_structural - should be frontmatter_noise (article type label, not body content)
Real: body_paragraph in frontmatter_main_zone - zone is wrong
Real: NOT FOUND - selector was wrong, actual text is 'Correspondence to: Dr J C Buckland-Wright'

assertions.text_contains: Relationship between changes in joint space
cartilage, measured as joint space narrowing
assertions.notes: Real: body_paragraph in tail_nonref_hold_zone - zone is wrong, this is body content

assertions.expected_text: Increasing the accuracy and reproducibility in standard radiography
assertions.notes: Real: split into 2 blocks, heading merge artifact needed

assertions.text_contains: I wish to express my gratitude
assertions.notes: No Acknowledgements heading - just backmatter body text
Real: unknown_structural in empty zone - should be reference_item (ref 58 continuation)

expected_bugs.description: Paper title gets role=unknown_structural (seed_role=paper_title but gate rejected). Author name gets role=unknown_structural. Both should be paper_title/authors.
expected_bugs.fix: paper_title/authors should be accepted by source-backed frontmatter artifact gate

expected_bugs.description: Page 1 body text (Radiography is important..., Scoring systems...) has zone=frontmatter_main_zone instead of body_zone. Frontmatter zone has no lower boundary.
expected_bugs.fix: Page 1 frontmatter zone must have lower boundary, not swallow two-column body text

expected_bugs.description: Running headers (Buckland-Wright, Quantitative radiography of OA) have role=noise but some still render. Need must_not_render gate.
expected_bugs.fix: Running headers should be noise with must_not_render=true

expected_bugs.description: Page 6 body text (cartilage, measured as joint space narrowing...) is in tail_nonref_hold_zone instead of body_zone. Tail detection spread too early.
expected_bugs.fix: tail_nonref_hold_zone spread must not consume body continuation pages

expected_bugs.description: Heading 'Increasing the accuracy and reproducibility in standard radiography' is split into 2 blocks with no merge artifact.
expected_bugs.fix: Heading merge logic needed for split headings

expected_bugs.description: Reference 58 continuation (formation and diminishes fibrillation) has role=unknown_structural in empty zone instead of reference_item in reference_zone.
REVIEW label has role=unknown_structural instead of frontmatter_noise.
expected_bugs.fix: Article type labels need dedicated classification as frontmatter_noise

expected_bugs.description: Figure object ownership not tested in expectations. Need to verify figures 1-3 are reader-visible with captions.
expected_bugs.fix: Add figure object ownership assertions to expectations
